project_type: Monorepo with 16 apps (7 Next.js frontends) + 70+ packages, pnpm + turbo
build_system: pnpm + turbo; turbo.json defines typecheck->test->build pipeline with ^build deps
test_framework: vitest with @testing-library/react in shared-ui; vitest in all packages
verification_instructions: Run pnpm typecheck first, then pnpm test, then pnpm build
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node v22 with pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, ESM modules, workspace:* internal deps
key_patterns: shared-ui exports React components with Props interfaces. Brand package exports motion springs/easing/duration. Apps use AppShell+Sidebar/TopBar+BottomNav pattern. CSS uses --quant-* and --brand-* custom properties. Advanced systems in shared-ui/src/advanced/ (AnimationEngine, ResponsiveSystem, CommandPalette classes). Each Next.js app has src/app/layout.tsx with Inter font + QueryProvider.
directory_structure: apps/ has 16 apps (7 Next.js: quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet). packages/ has 70+ shared packages including shared-ui (React components), brand (colors/typography/motion), command-palette (registry/executor).
